texto: But that’s the wonderful thing about foreign travel, suddenly you are five years old again. You can’t read anything, you have only the most basic sense of how things work, you can’t even reliably cross the street without endangering your life. Your whole existence becomes a series of interesting guesses.
explicacao: Citação de Bill Bryan sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “But that’s the wonderful thing about foreign travel, suddenly you are five years old again.
